45000872.text:
🎉 **Congratulations!** Our beautiful baby has arrived! 

*breathing heavily with joy and relief*

Welcome to the world, my little one! I'm so happy you're finally here. 💕👶

6422938.text: Oh! It's time! Let me bring our baby into the world!

92571118.text:
# *WAAAAHHHHH!* 😭

I cry! I cry a lot! 

*whimper whimper*

That's what I do. I cry because my diaper is wet, or I'm hungry, or I'm sleepy, or I just... cry. 

*bawl bawl bawl*

I also make little gurgling sounds and sometimes I smile but mostly I CRY! 

*WAAAAAHHHHH!* 😭
